$comment: GetIt package metadata for Delphi-OBD v2. Submitted to GetIt
after the stable v2.0.0 tag ships; the beta is github-only.
Schema follows the Embarcadero GetIt package descriptor
format. Update version + supported_studios on every release.
name: Delphi-OBD
summary: Production-quality, RAD-first, open-source automotive diagnostics, coding, and flashing for Delphi.
description: Component-first RAD package covering diagnostics, coding,
calibration and ECU flashing across modern automotive
protocols. Drop a TOBDConnection on a form, point a
TOBDAdapter at it, point a TOBDLiveData at the protocol,
press F9.
Ships:
- 32 design-time components (Connection, Adapter, Protocol,
DoIP, SecOC, LiveData, DTCs, VIN, FreezeFrame, OnBoard
Monitor, Actuator, Coding, Flashing, XCP, CCP, IsoBus,
Recorder, Replayer, ...).
- 26 IDE starter templates (File > New > Other > Delphi-OBD).
- Full UDS / KWP2000 / J1939 / DoIP / SecOC / LIN / FlexRay /
MOST surfaces.
- Production-grade flash pipeline with voltage gate, image
applicability, signature verification (BCrypt / OpenSSL /
PKCS#11 HSM / post-quantum), atomic checkpoint, audit log.
- JSON-Schema-validated catalogs for PIDs / DTCs / NRCs /
DIDs / J1939 PGNs / OEM coding options.
Hardware-safety: every destructive component defaults
AutoExecute = False. Read docs/flashing-safety.md before
running any flash operation against a real vehicle.

packages.name: DelphiOBD_RT
packages.description: Delphi-OBD runtime package — every component, codec, catalog loader, signature backend, and helper.

packages.name: DelphiOBD_DT
packages.description: Delphi-OBD design-time package — palette icons, splash + About registration, property editors, component editors with live-test verbs, IDE starter wizard.
